courses.title: Angular Fundamentals
courses.description: A comprehensive course on Angular framework covering components, directives, services, routing and state management for building modern single-page applications.

courses.title: Node.js & Express
courses.description: Build scalable server-side applications using Node.js and Express framework. Covers REST APIs, middleware, authentication, and database integration.

courses.title: Machine Learning Basics
courses.description: Introduction to machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, model training and evaluation using Python, scikit-learn, and TensorFlow.

courses.title: Database Management
courses.description: Relational and NoSQL database design, SQL queries, indexing, transactions, normalization and database optimization techniques.

courses.title: Cloud Computing (AWS)
courses.description: Comprehensive guide to AWS cloud services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC, IAM and best practices for cloud architecture design.

courses.title: React.js Development
courses.description: Modern React development with hooks, context API, Redux, React Router and best practices for building performant user interfaces.
